creator: Harlan.Stenn@pfcs.com
text:
From a freshly booted 2.2-current box, I cd to an automounted
	directory containing the exim-1.62 sources, and from there to
	Build-FreeBSD-FreeBSD.  I type "make", and somewhere between
	compiling the 3rd file and the final link, the process hangs.
	Eventually, "df" and "ls" hang, too.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Reboot the 2.2-current box, cd to the NFS dir, type make, wait.

	I can provide an ssh login to somebody who can help debug this.

	I have a "hung make" there now, for example.
